title: Luxor Roundtrip
summary: A seven-night roundtrip from Luxor — sailing south through the temples and back, beginning and ending in the heart of ancient Thebes.
routeOverview: A seven-night roundtrip that begins and ends in Luxor, sailing south to the temples of Esna, Edfu, and Kom Ombo before returning through ancient Thebes — convenient for travellers flying in and out of Luxor.

timeline.title: Detailed day-by-day coming soon
timeline.description: We're finalising the full daily programme for this voyage. Contact us and we'll share the complete itinerary, tailored to your dates and group.
